name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: our new ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Watch it here
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdhhutt-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, Last night, I watched Bill Hagerty’s latest attack ad on me. I’ll be honest: I had conflicting emotions as I watched it. I was disappointed because of just how dishonest the attack was. **But I was also hopeful -_because Bill Hagerty wouldn’t be attacking us like this if we weren’t winning._** So how do we respond to an ad that’s full of falsehoods? With our own, called “The Truth.” [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdhhutt-olhhkyhhid-j/) [WATCH OUR NEW AD NOW - "THE TRUTH"](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdhhutt-olhhkyhhid-t/) If Bill Hagerty’s plan to get to the Senate is to try and deceive Tennessee voters, I guess he’s welcome to do that. All we can do is tell the truth, and rely on the honesty and intelligence of the people of Tennessee. I’m counting on that. Here’s the Truth: I’ve always opposed Obamacare - I even testified before the U.S. Senate against it. I think what stings the most is hearing Bill Hagerty say I’m not pro-life. As a Christian, I believe we're called to protect the unborn, and as a doctor, I’ve taken an oath and dedicated my life to protecting all human life. That's why I'm pro-life. I want you to know how much Maya and I appreciate your support. I’ve been thinking a lot about the verse from Galatians lately, “Let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.” We’re doing a good thing here in this campaign. Let’s just keep working, and keep telling the truth. Thanks for standing with us. Thank you for your support,
Dr. Manny Sethi
Conservative Republican for U.S. Senate Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Captain Kevin Penn, USMC (Ret.)
subject: My Joe Biden story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Over the course of my career, I've had the opportunity to meet a handful of leaders with true character. Joe Biden is one of them. I want to tell you why. |
---
My name is Kevin.

For 20 years and 8 days, I served in the U.S. Marine Corps--as a helicopter mechanic, as a drill instructor, and as an intelligence officer, deploying three times--to the Persian Gulf, Iraq, and Kuwait.

Since my retirement from the Corps, my most important title is "volunteer." Today, I spend most of my time with the Tragedy Assistance Program for Survivors (TAPS), working with children and other Gold Star family members grieving the loss of a loved one who served and died, regardless of the timing or circumstances.

**Over the course of my career, I've had the opportunity to meet a handful of leaders with true character. Joe Biden is one of them. I want to tell you why.**

The first time I met Joe Biden was at a TAPS event, with the children of deceased service members. It was a closed-media event--no news outlets of any kind, just the mentors and the kids they worked with. Suddenly, the back door opens, and in walks then-Vice President Joe Biden. He didn't come in with fanfare, he didn't get up on stage or stand behind a podium.

He made it very clear to us: "I'm here for the kids." And he proceeded to speak with, take photos with, and shake the hands of every kid in that room. They were over the moon. I had never seen anything like it. And by the way, this was several years before Joe lost his own son, Major Beau Biden.

The second time I met Joe Biden was in April of 2010, on the South Lawn of the White House. I was part of a group of active-duty service members sending off our wounded brothers and sisters for the White House to Lighthouse Challenge -- a 60-mile, three-day ride that starts on the South Lawn of the White House and ends in Annapolis, Maryland.

Then-Vice President Biden delivered remarks, joined all of us to see the warriors off, and then walked straight into the crowd of servicemembers--shaking hands, taking photos, listening to people's stories.

And here's the part I haven't forgotten:

Joe was definitely running late for some meeting or another because his staff was getting increasingly persistent--"Sir, we really need to go." Not in a way that was disrespectful. It was just clear that they needed to be on their way.

Finally, Joe turned to his aides and said:

**"I'm going to stay here shaking hands until there's nobody left to shake hands with, and taking photos with these people until they get every photo they want."**

That's exactly what he did. And I promise you that the service men and women who were on the South Lawn that day haven't forgotten it, either.

Character is about what you do when the cameras aren't rolling.

Joe Biden is a man of character.

And in the age of Twitter and perfect sound bites--people who are most interested in themselves, shaping their own image--Joe Biden is a man who, after more than 40 years of public service, still wants to give. I honestly get chills when I think about his empathy for and dedication to everyone but himself.

At a time when everything feels disingenuous and hand-crafted for a certain audience, Joe Biden is genuine.

**Now more than ever, we need to have leaders we truly believe in. I truly believe in Joe Biden. I hope you'll join me in supporting his campaign:** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: BREAKING: Sean Hannity Endorses Bill For Senate
body:

Peter,I wanted to make sure you saw this [tweet](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdkyhlt-fuutjhhtj-r/) by Sean Hannity, joining Senator Marsha Blackburn, Donald Trump Jr. and President Trump in endorsing my campaign for U.S. Senate. He's been a leading conservative voice for decades and knows just how important it is that we send President Trump another strong ally from Tennessee. In the Senate, I will be that ally to the President and will partner with Senator Blackburn to protect our conservative values. I appreciate your support. | | Friend, This year has been a difficult one for our state: the pandemic has tested our ability to come together and the murder of George Floyd shed light on how deeply rooted racism is in our society. The stakes are high and now is the time for us to come together and solve the greatest problems facing our state. This weekend, we are 100 days from election day. We have 100 days left to build our movement to protect and expand our House DFL Majority. **Here 's how you can help us for free:** Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be completely refunded to you by the state. Our records show that you have not yet had the opportunity to donate to our campaign. Would you help us build our movement today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/awePcWnovs9Jdy-lHKdqSBtFzeBKAHDhXfnAHXHwXek=/K7qR7qOkGzQhb_85j7n--7sbVBUdRPv9KD6JWTsd4WQ=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=0725202) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/awePcWnovs9Jdy-lHKdqSBtFzeBKAHDhXfnAHXHwXek=/K7qR7qOkGzQhb_85j7n--7sbVBUdRPv9KD6JWTsd4WQ=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=0725202) [**Or, donate another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/awePcWnovs9Jdy-lHKdqSBtFzeBKAHDhXfnAHXHwXek=/K7qR7qOkGzQhb_85j7n--7sbVBUdRPv9KD6JWTsd4WQ=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=0725202) Real progress relies on our ability to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone, no exceptions. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Days Until Election Tuesday: 100
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

The countdown to Election Day now stands at 100 days. 100 days from now we will make decisions that could reverberate in America for years to come.

**[Will you chip in to help Democrats in Arizona and across the country make a final push to make sure we have representatives who can get us back on track in Washington?](https://act.myngp.com/el/DnztCFxX9K9VMwAGISLUmw7-Pai00nKst5hl11EYDpg=/_dmK0b47-65FMmecoCGSpU7a67QDk074ZRPPwvUMIE4=?refcode=X_072020_100Days_D)**

Arizonans deserve to have their voices heard in Washington, not ignored to placate monied special interests. Chip in and help us turn Arizona blue--together, we can make the changes to our country we want for ourselves and our families.
> _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Joe
subject: Can you attend our virtual concert tonight, Peter?
body:
Join us tonight for performances and conversations with some of your favorite musicians and entertainers! |
---
Peter, we have some exciting news:

Tonight, at 8 PM eastern time, you are invited to our Celebration of Change, a virtual concert for all of our grassroots supporters!

**Check out the incredible lineup and make sure to sign up [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de085/2433465435/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://live.joebiden.com/c/celebration-for-change-100-days-to-go?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac") and tune in tonight at 8PM EDT:** | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de085/2433465435/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://live.joebiden.com/c/celebration-for-change-100-days-to-go?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac")
---
[SIGN UP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de085/2433465435/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://live.joebiden.com/c/celebration-for-change-100-days-to-go?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac")
---
Join us tonight for performances and conversations with some of your favorite musicians and entertainers! We're so excited to unite for this Celebration of Change and to talk about why we're all on Team Joe and ready to win this thing in November.

**To watch, all you have to do is sign up [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de085/2433465435/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://live.joebiden.com/c/celebration-for-change-100-days-to-go?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac") and tune in tonight at 8PM EDT to catch the program.**

Peter, we're grateful to have you on our team fighting to defeat Donald Trump and the Republicans. We hope this concert will be both a fun, uplifting activity for you, your family, and friends, and also a reminder of the kind of change we can make when we come together and fight for it.

So again, thank you for being here and for staying engaged. We say it a lot, but we are so thankful to have you in this fight with us -- and we're excited to show you our gratitude at this virtual celebration!

We'll see you tonight!

Team Joe
[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.26_B5_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1_ac")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de083/2433465435/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de082/2433465435/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de081/2433465435/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de080/2433465435/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de17f/2433465435/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de17e/2433465435/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de17d/2433465435/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b923/1cd0ac28/1744c950e/357de17e/2433465435/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

subject: There’s still time to fight

name: Christy Smith
subject: $22.44 -- our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

I'm not usually this blunt, but I need you to know what's going on.

We started from scratch last month. What I mean by that is this: We spent every penny in our account for our special election in May -- and that means we have to build back up to take on Mike Garcia's corporate donors in November.

**Candidates in other races were able to raise and save their money through 2019 to spend it _now_ , with the general election just 100 days away. We couldn't do that.**

That means we have to campaign twice as hard with less than half the time other House campaigns have had to build their cash reserves.

**[So we need your help more than ever. Our average grassroots donation is just $22.44 -- can you pitch in that amount or more?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f00/445344879/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f01/445344879/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f02/445344879/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f03/445344879/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f1c/445344879/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f1d/445344879/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f00/445344879/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non")
This time around we have less attention on our race and diminished resources. But because we're expecting much higher voter turnout, our chances of victory are much, much higher.

We really are a campaign by and for people. I won't take corporate PAC or D.C. lobbyist money like my opponent because I won't be bought and sold by groups that simply want a puppet in office. **I'm running to represent _you._**

I'm so proud that our average grassroots online donation is just **$22.44.** I think it shows that ours is a truly people-powered campaign -- and I wouldn't have it any other way.

**[Peter: Can you commit to a donation of $22.44 right now to support Team Christy? We need money in the bank to fund our Get Out the Vote efforts (Election Day is sooner than you think!) and any amount you can give will be critical to this campaign's success.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f1e/445344879/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non&amount=22.44")**

Thank you for your support,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f00/445344879/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd79/29776869/904430a/569e8f00/445344879/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjZfemVyb19ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200726_zero_non")

name: Josh Hicks
subject: 100 days out: What I’ve learned on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
When we launched this campaign last summer, we knew we were in for a long journey to bring change to Kentucky’s 6th District.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18412301/227750607/-46754211?refcode=HIC_20200726_em_non_100days_all_hdr_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyZDU3MC02MWNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W06sglsvfTYnxpKn81WEQbwOsn6V5dN80r-mZnpfCNk=)
| | Hey friends, When we launched this campaign last summer, we knew we were in for a long journey to bring change to Kentucky’s 6th District. But no one could’ve predicted that, during this historic election year, we’d also be navigating a pandemic, a necessary resurgence in demands for racial justice, and record unemployment. **Now, just 100 days from Election Day, this race is kicking into full gear.** We’ve been out in the district, socially distant and safe — talking with local leaders and regular folks — about the issues that matter most to them. I attended the Madison County Democratic Women's Club meeting last week. I was thankful for the opportunity to speak in front of these incredible women, and so grateful for their efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18412303/227750610/-46754211?refcode=HIC_20200726_em_non_100days_all_img1_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyZDU3MC02MWNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W06sglsvfTYnxpKn81WEQbwOsn6V5dN80r-mZnpfCNk=)
---
I also attended a socially-distanced graduation at the Military Adventure Camp at Camp Sousley in Fleming County. I’m already a proud Fleming County boy, and seeing these impressive young people made me that much prouder.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18412305/227750612/-46754211?refcode=HIC_20200726_em_non_100days_all_img2_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyZDU3MC02MWNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W06sglsvfTYnxpKn81WEQbwOsn6V5dN80r-mZnpfCNk=)
---
With just a few months left until Election Day, we’re continuing, safely, on the campaign trail. This race isn’t about me or my opponent — it’s about you, and bringing real representation back to this district.
Thank you for being on Team Kentucky and Team Hicks. We’ll never stop working for you.
\- Josh

clean_body: When we launched this campaign last summer, we knew we were in for a long journey to bring change to Kentucky’s 6th District. | = | | Hey friends, When we launched this campaign last summer, we knew we were in for a long journey to bring change to Kentucky’s 6th District. But no one could’ve predicted that, during this historic election year, we’d also be navigating a pandemic, a necessary resurgence in demands for racial justice, and record unemployment. Now, just 100 days from Election Day, this race is kicking into full gear. We’ve been out in the district, socially distant and safe — talking with local leaders and regular folks — about the issues that matter most to them. I attended the Madison County Democratic Women's Club meeting last week. I was thankful for the opportunity to speak in front of these incredible women, and so grateful for their efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot. | = I also attended a socially-distanced graduation at the Military Adventure Camp at Camp Sousley in Fleming County. I’m already a proud Fleming County boy, and seeing these impressive young people made me that much prouder. = With just a few months left until Election Day, we’re continuing, safely, on the campaign trail. This race isn’t about me or my opponent — it’s about you, and bringing real representation back to this district. Thank you for being on Team Kentucky and Team Hicks. We’ll never stop working for you. \- Josh | | = | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: America at a crossroads: 100 Days Until the November Election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,
You were probably wondering where we were on Friday. We missed you too, but we had a big announcement to make today: WE. ARE. ONLY. 100. DAYS. AWAY. FROM. THE. NOVEMBER 3RD. ELECTION.
November 3rd is the most important election of our lifetime. It is the day you will vote to put Joe Biden into the White House. It is the day you will vote to flip House and Senate seats in the Tennessee Legislature. It is the day you will vote to send Democrats to the U.S. Senate and Congress.
If you are already giving your time, skills, and money to a @tndp candidate, thank you.
If not, it’s time to join the movement.
Find out more about Tennessee's Democratic candidates at tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates [http://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates] and let’s go!
Voting is now underway for the August 6th election. The August 6th election is a primary election which determines which state, local, and national candidates you'll see on the ballot on November 3rd.
Whether you've already early voted for the August 6th election and you're making a plan for November 3rd, OR you need still need to make a plan to vote in the primary, here's a list to help you plan for voting during COVID-19:
*
MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE: Will you vote early or on election day? In the morning, lunchtime, or at night? Will you take the kids?
WEAR A MASK
SOCIALLY DISTANCE WHILE WAITING IN LINE
BRING HAND SANITIZER IF YOU CAN
REMEMBER TO BRING A PHOTO ID
EARLY VOTING: Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission to find:
Locations, days and times
Sample ballots
ELECTION DAY IS AUGUST 6 AND NOVEMBER 3: You will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here.
ABSENTEE VOTING: If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. You also have the option to vote in-person during early voting or on Election Day. More info on absentee voting can be found here.
DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot
PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 615-327-9779, fill out this incidident report form, reach out to the TNDP voter protectection Director, Kendra Lee, at kendra@tndp.org with any other questions or problems you have about voting.
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSft6wbM_pq57TuelhFVLjPr5YqeKq-Yy5P8PYv04GHf-Ul0lw/viewform]
,
reach
out
to
the
TNDP
voter
protectection
Director,
Kendra
Lee,
at
kendra@tndp.org
[kendra@tndp.org]
with
any
other
questions
or
problems
you
have
about
voting.
See you at the polls,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-26%20at%2010.42.43%20AM.png]
One of the most impactful ways to volunteer on November 3rd is to train to become a poll watcher. Since the gutting of the Voting Rights Act there have been countless measures aimed at suppressing the vote in traditionally vulnerable communities. Republicans have teamed with election commissions to deploy modern day voter suppression tactics. Poll watchers will be the person on the ground at each polling site ensuring every individual has the right to exercise their right to vote. As a poll watcher you will:
*
Resolve
voting
issues
with
election
officials
inside
the
polling
place
*
Resolve
voting
issues
with
voters
outside
the
polling
place
(i.e.,
outside
the
100-foot
boundary)
*
Collect
all
relevant
information
and
quickly
report
it
“up
the
chain”
TNDP is currently recruiting poll watcher volunteers. Email Kendra@tndp.org [Kendra@tndp.org] to volunteer.
IT'S CRUNCHTIME. WE NEED YOUR HELP
July and August are traditionally the hardest months to raise money in politics. With everything a stake in this election we have to not only meet but exceed expectations. And that’s why we’ve created the Amplify Democrats program. It’s a program designed to promote and support the voices of Democrats and Democratic candidates in our communities, and promote local platforms and policies that will make positive change for Tennesseans.
We're 100 days out and it's crunchtime. Will you help us?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

| | I'll get right to it. We have 100 days until the final votes are cast in our race in IL-16. **Your support means more now than ever before.**

Our message of lowering prescription drug costs, raising wages, and fighting for equality for every American is a winning message, and with your help, we can make sure that the voters hear our message loud and clear.
**In order to win, we need to make sure that every voter in this district can hear our message over the next 100 days.**

**[Click here to donate and propel us to victory down the stretch](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=216344d179&e=140a9b81e7)**[**!**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=08c8eda2cd&e=140a9b81e7)

**This election cycle is unlike any other, and your contribution will help us fund our new digital voter outreach strategy that will be crucial to our success.** My opponent has called on his friends from Wall Street and the NRA to boost his campaign, but I don't need to rely on dirty money to win this race. I know I can rely on _you. _

Your support has put us in a position to win this race, and now we need your continued support to make sure we cross the finish line first.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: 100 Days Until Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18413014/227769877/818536202?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWE5MTcxMi02OGNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PizYN6StR2ij1MwqlLDqW3N9-6zSI9HUfJAZLasYbKM=&emci=b98cc7f9-65cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=89a91712-68cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=5094937)
Fellow Democrat,
Today is 100 days until Election Day and as you know, GOP Secretary of State Mac Warner is keeping voters in the dark and confused about how they will be able to cast their ballots in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic.
In West Virginia, the state with the most vulernable population, our numbers are worse than ever. Our cases are climbing by record number day to day and registered voters in West Virginia deserve to be able to vote safely in the general election.
While other states (where numbers are lower than ours) are working hard to ensure that their voters are heard and kept safe, Mac Warner is making it harder for us to vote safely.
We're 100 days away from the most important election of our lifetimes and Mac Warner is trying to suppress our voting rights.
Please sign this petition urging him to do the right thing and send every registered voter in West Virginia an absentee ballot application due to the cirumstances surrounding COVID-19: [https://bit.ly/AbsenteePetition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18413015/227769878/818536202?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWE5MTcxMi02OGNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PizYN6StR2ij1MwqlLDqW3N9-6zSI9HUfJAZLasYbKM=&emci=b98cc7f9-65cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=89a91712-68cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=5094937).
Thank you,
Team WVDP

name: Howard Dean
subject: Battleground Georgia unlocks the whole map.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Reverend Warnock is the leader we need to meet this moment
| | |
---
Friend - we can win in all 50 states if we fight in all 50 states. And let me tell you, the Senate race for unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler's seat in Georgia is 100% a winnable fight. With Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) at the helm, we will turn that seat blue - and actually earn it, unlike its current occupant. Here's how I know:
When I served as chair of the DNC during the 2006 elections, we won the House _and_ flipped the Senate blue. We did it by building the strongest grassroots team possible and fighting tooth and nail for every seat, in every state. And this year, we can do the same if we do what it takes to support game-changing candidates nationwide - starting with Reverend Raphael Warnock in his Georgia race.
It's never been more important that we send leaders to Washington who will champion the needs of the people, not the profiteers. The stakes are too high for anything less. **But Reverend Warnock is facing a critical fundraising deadline, and he's counting on us to help him raise $20,000 by midnight tonight.** [**So I'm asking personally: Will you give $5 right now to power his campaign and help Democrats win everywhere this November?**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e27d/288179be/9cda27e/348e0244/1791073506/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk393-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first Black senator Georgia has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
All of that makes him the exact right person to meet this moment in history. I haven't lived through a time like this since 1968 - it feels as though an earthquake has shaken this country, and it's so obvious that we need to elect leaders who will continue our push for civil rights and champion the fights started at the very pulpit where Reverend Warnock now preaches.
**I meant what I said: We can win in all 50 states if we _fight_ in all 50 states. There are two Senate races in Georgia this year, and they're both 100% winnable. I know we can elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue. But we can't make any mistakes. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says we need to win Georgia to take back the Senate. This is the first battleground that unlocks the whole map.**
**Right now, ahead of their critical deadline, Reverend Warnock's team tells me they're still falling short of their goal. Time is running out, and we only win together, so please: [Will you give $5 or more now ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e27d/288179be/9cda27e/348e0244/1791073506/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk393-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")[-](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e27d/288179be/9cda27e/348e0244/1791073506/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk393-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")[ to help Reverend Warnock reach his campaign's goal, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e27d/288179be/9cda27e/348e0244/1791073506/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A Thanks for believing that what's right is also what's possible. Let's go.

Howard Dean
_Former VT governor
Former chair, DNC_

| Friends,

We are officially 100 days out from the general election on November 3rd!

I'd like to thank everyone who has devoted time or contributed to our campaign. Your help is what keeps the gears of this machine moving!

As we enter the home stretch of this campaign, I'd like to invite you to help in any way that you can. Whether it's donating $25 or knocking on doors; your help can really push us over the edge to win this election.

[Click here to join Team Miller-Meeks](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=47fc9930e8&e=16fac31a0f) or [c](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=874faeb218&e=16fac31a0f)[lick here to chip in $25, $100 or even $50 today!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=8edf333799&e=16fac31a0f)

With your help we will flip this seat **RED** in November!

I'm grateful for your support,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Bruce, Warner Campaign Manager
subject: 100 days from Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our strategy for Mark Warner's re-election campaign
|
---

| | Derek --

I'm sure this isn't the only email in your inbox letting you know that we're 100 days away from the November election. **I hope you'll take some time to read about our strategy for Mark Warner's re-election campaign.**

I am going to ask for your support to keep this campaign moving forward, but first I want to take a moment to congratulate our team on the hard work they've done and explain the path forward we've charted.

Working with the Virginia Coordinated Campaign, we've already reached impressive levels of voter contact, including:
* Over **2 million text messages** exchanged with Virginia voters;
* Over **2,000 virtual events** across the statewide organizing campaign;
* Over **100,000 phone calls** made to Virginia voters;
* And over **700 volunteers** activated to elect Democrats up and down the ticket.

**But I know that to win this Fall, we need some help to keep the momentum going.**

There's no doubt about it: 2020 looks different. We're facing a global pandemic. Instead of rallies and parades, our team has pivoted to online events, virtual town halls, and voter communication over text and by phone instead of face-to-face.

And, looking forward to November, I know folks are concerned about how to safely cast their ballot. We've adjusted our voter education efforts to include more information about all of the options to vote in Virginia, whether that's with a no-excuse absentee ballot, early in-person, or in-person on Election Day.

**I remember Mark's 2014 campaign -- he won by less than 1%.** That's why we can't take anything for granted, especially during this massive shift in campaign strategy. I am so proud of this team for rising to the challenge. **Now, I'm asking for your help to keep this campaign moving forward.**

Here's that ask I promised at the top of the email: if you support Mark and want to protect the progress we've made in Virginia, **[will you contribute to Mark's re-election campaign if you have the means?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb8/53d9897e/54640986/1c885819/3154355831/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/100daysstrategy?refcode=20200726_f_1_nd__673__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

I've said it before, but it bears repeating: supporters like you are what keeps us going, Derek. I appreciate you taking the time to read more about our path forward.

Thank you for your continued support.

--Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager

P.S. Looking for a way to get involved right now? **[Here are some ways to get involved with the campaign beyond contributing financially.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb8/53d9897e/54640986/1c885818/3154355831/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/get-involved/")**

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb8/53d9897e/54640986/1c885807/3154355831/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/100daysstrategy?refcode=20200726_f_1_nd__673__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb8/53d9897e/54640986/1c885806/3154355831/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
That's not a lot of time to finish building the movement we need to flip Texas in November!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1b/841856231/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **_ELECTION DAY IS JUST_
_100 DAYS AWAY!_

100 Days Out Goal:
**13 New* Donors from Your Community**

**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1a/841856231/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200726.1nd__1786__&amount=10")****
---
Peter --

We're only 100 days away from Election Day, and that's not a lot of time to finish building the movement we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn! We've come a long way thanks to your help, winning the primary and setting turnout records in the runoff -- but **we have to keep the momentum going!**

_The Cook Political Report_ and _Inside Elections_ have already upgraded this race in MJ's favor, and **new polling reveals Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable**. He has abysmal approval ratings and a ton of Texans report that they're undecided in the general election.

But **we need the resources to reach all those undecided voters** before they cast their ballots, and that's why we're coming to you. Unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. She's counting on this grassroots team to power her campaign all the way!

**Sen. Cornyn is calling in big money special interests to defend him, but we can fight back against them if just 13 new* donors from your community contribute today. Will you make a donation now to help us reach our goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1f/841856231/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200726.1nd__1786__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1e/841856231/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200726.1nd__1786__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1d/841856231/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200726.1nd__1786__")**
Thanks,
Team MJ
*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed1/7f51f7bc/4057067b/4ef64e1a/841856231/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200726.1nd__1786__&amount=10")**

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: three reasons to chip in $5 to elect Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As of today, there are just 100 days until Election Day. |
---
**Hi Peter. As of today, there are just 100 days until Election Day.**

_Can you believe it?_

We're in the heat of the general election, but there's still so much you can do to make sure we elect Joe Biden in November -- including chipping in $5 to help the campaign enter the last 100 days as strong as possible. Here are three reasons why:
* Even after a surge of fundraising success, we still need to fully close our cash-on-hand gap against Donald Trump and the RNC. **As of June 30, Trump and the RNC still have an advantage of over $50 million.**

* We're intensifying our ad budget as we speak, and just launched a brand new $15 million ad buy, reaching voters in Pennsylvania, Arizona, Wisconsin, Michigan, North Carolina, and Florida. **It 's important that we have the financial strength to keep our ads running at the strongest levels possible!**

* Grassroots donors account for 97% of all of our campaign's contributions -- so if we're going to meet tonight's fundraising goal, and enter the final stretch of this election running strong, **it 's going to have to be because of folks like you, reading emails like these, and chipping in a few dollars at a time.**

We hope you see now why it's so important that we bring in another 900 donations from Pennsylvania before midnight tonight to mark a strong 100 days out. We wouldn't email you if it wasn't!

[So what do you say, Peter? Can you make your first $5 donation to help us meet tonight's big milestone with a show of fundraising strength?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B1_100daysmg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B1_100daysmg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | **Supporter:[Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B1_100daysmg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B1_100daysmg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")**

clean_body: As of today, there are just 100 days until Election Day. | Hi Peter. As of today, there are just 100 days until Election Day. Can you believe it? We're in the heat of the general election, but there's still so much you can do to make sure we elect Joe Biden in November -- including chipping in $5 to help the campaign enter the last 100 days as strong as possible. Here are three reasons why: Even after a surge of fundraising success, we still need to fully close our cash-on-hand gap against Donald Trump and the RNC. As of June 30, Trump and the RNC still have an advantage of over $50 million. We're intensifying our ad budget as we speak, and just launched a brand new $15 million ad buy, reaching voters in Pennsylvania, Arizona, Wisconsin, Michigan, North Carolina, and Florida. It 's important that we have the financial strength to keep our ads running at the strongest levels possible! Grassroots donors account for 97% of all of our campaign's contributions -- so if we're going to meet tonight's fundraising goal, and enter the final stretch of this election running strong, it 's going to have to be because of folks like you, reading emails like these, and chipping in a few dollars at a time. We hope you see now why it's so important that we bring in another 900 donations from Pennsylvania before midnight tonight to mark a strong 100 days out. We wouldn't email you if it wasn't! Folks, I can’t believe it, but today, **we’re officially 100 days away from the general election on November 3rd** , the day I go up against Cindy Hyde-Smith to be Mississippi’s next United States senator. That means time is running out for our people-powered campaign to generate resources, build the biggest ground game our state has ever seen, and get the word out across to everyone — no easy feat in the middle of this pandemic. Thanks to you, we outraised Hyde-Smith nearly 3:1 last quarter, showing how strong our team really is. But being a Republican incumbent, Hyde-Smith has the backing of Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and his multi-million dollar network of dark money and Super PACs — ready to swoop in and attack me at any moment! 100 days from now, I want to look back and know we did absolutely everything we could to replace Hyde-Smith, flip this seat, and move Mississippi forward to a brighter future – one with affordable health care for all, high-quality public education, and promising job opportunities. _We can’t leave anything on the table._ **That’s why I’m asking if you’ll pitch in today. We’re facing our July fundraising deadline this coming Friday, and I don’t want us to have any regrets come November. name: Betsy Rader
subject: What's It Like to Run in a Rigged Election?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
|
---
Peter, Please join us on Monday, July 27 at 7 p.m for a "Congressional Reunion" event with 6 of the Ohio Democratic congressional candidates from 2018 and Eric Holder's National Democratic Redistricting Committee for a discussion on the impacts of gerrymandering and single-party rule in Ohio. Now more than ever we can see that it's critical to elect as many Democrats as possible to the Statehouse this year so that when the federal and state districts are re-drawn next year we can get rid of the rigged system and safe seats that have led to so much corruption. The event will be hosted via Zoom and streamed to Facebook Live. RSVP to Ethan Gruber at [ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/wTpesVP8-FE2UHBilUx8QF3eLI0upgZXevDI9kLEBEk=?subject=RSVP-Congressional%20Reunion%20Fundraiser) or 567.203.3847 to receive a link to the Zoom event. **Proceeds benefit my race for the Ohio State Senate, which has the opportunity to re-draw Congressional districts in 2021** _**Tickets:**_ [Sponsor](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/dpvwOqSTTuzGbO4FgKRx0sgNlZLz_uKMqApLpmKtlqk=)\- $500 [Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/dpvwOqSTTuzGbO4FgKRx0sgNlZLz_uKMqApLpmKtlqk=)\- $250 [Supporter](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/dpvwOqSTTuzGbO4FgKRx0sgNlZLz_uKMqApLpmKtlqk=)\- $100 [Guest](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/dpvwOqSTTuzGbO4FgKRx0sgNlZLz_uKMqApLpmKtlqk=)\- $50 Or follow the link below to purchase a ticket [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reunion7.27#](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFbkqiQi4QgkZd-A24LeXlCruPflrnJADLtwpbJId6c=/dpvwOqSTTuzGbO4FgKRx0sgNlZLz_uKMqApLpmKtlqk=) _(Please note the individual contribution limit for this race is $13,292)_ _Please make checks payable to:_ Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty, OH 44072 Looking forward to seeing you there! Hello, **[I’m reaching out today to ask you to donate to our campaign for Congress. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but you can make a contribution here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18414572/227810360/-1422218393?refcode=em200726-amy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWUwYjk3Yy03OGNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-17gJLWQdZ-aGw9MpayH-lRMATUmfSbl_tHIMj_VZA=)** Anything you can pitch in today will go a long way. You see, as of this morning we are officially 100 days away from the election. November 3rd will be here before we know it. That means we have very little time to build our general election campaign, build out our organizing team, and buy air time to compete with the onslaught of negative ads sure to come our way in the fall. **On top of all of this crucial work we have ahead of us -- and the very little time we have to do it -- we are starting at a disadvantage. Jeff Van Drew already has $1 million in the bank -- not to mention the entire Trump fundraising machine at his disposal.** As you know, we aren’t taking any money from corporate PACs in this election. clean_body: | Hello, = Anything you can pitch in today will go a long way. You see, as of this morning we are officially 100 days away from the election. November 3rd will be here before we know it. That means we have very little time to build our general election campaign, build out our organizing team, and buy air time to compete with the onslaught of negative ads sure to come our way in the fall. On top of all of this crucial work we have ahead of us -- and the very little time we have to do it -- we are starting at a disadvantage. Jeff Van Drew already has $1 million in the bank -- not to mention the entire Trump fundraising machine at his disposal. As you know, we aren’t taking any money from corporate PACs in this election. Instead, we’re counting on grassroots contributions to win. That’s why I am asking you today: Will you make a contribution of any amount -- whatever is meaningful to you -- to help us close this fundraising gap and flip this seat blue? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all you do for our campaign and for our community. Together, we’re demonstrating what’s possible when you reject politics-as-usual and build a grassroots campaign from the ground up. Let’s show Van Drew and Trump just how powerful this movement is. — Amy P.S. Please take care of yourself and family first and only contribute if it makes sense for you. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: What Hoosier leaders are saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Together, we can all do our part to keep our fellow Hoosiers healthy and keep our state open! | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=377d24c1ee5d439288d45888036cfcb5&_e=LJvjXWJWSMuFiK29_7QHml4QS_E3lpobWHkYFSLi32FZ413kFDcoNZvkB0mw7aBDB9bXoBJtBS41G5cwkNu6VjZt9q7EbVdUhUrFr5sJwZrB1vGonBLZ4l-uCRI_LFoSsUfgIdqdCbU7vVBqAI4cKCX44s9xNLDD-7ZUPHA75QOnm_ScG94HsJfQJAujU1ag5SwNanfW1LCDblxabA6MU_0y8CRNOSp84EfUfvgFWXk-Vfj4Mn4UHqcLHZNIcIHZZNST8whBzSmMz8nwOTkiILgEfUma2KGT_7e5OZ8CEiTkA7LCHhfbRQBXqJoiibh7eqCDO5ex2N2TfltPfO3JAXmJgFNds0GImIXdD1GJ28DF6lZm9mmyrxNKdJ1yVr_sHJ9y8OJB7jRrIHdLAMkMgxqO2Z3v4hX5tCSBXP5uLE_cb-JxKav-IiAbl-e17U6-FtUD3kEvxLBlctwKJC0hsn0FQ2btl_enyxHP9hJyb9RUvVg6zygwYMJd8GZt23oBrlU6a6mNVi2Y8ja1Ekpmuw%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
Friends,

As Indiana’s COVID-19 rates rise (positivity rates, hospitalizations, etc.), Hoosier leaders across our state are standing in support of Governor Holcomb’s statewide mask mandate.

Together, we’re all working hard to get Indiana back on track – and we want to keep it that way. By socially distancing, washing our hands, and wearing our masks when we go out, we can do what it takes to keep our state open!

_“Governor, I want everyone in this state to know the President and I and our entire team fully support your leadership and the steps you’ve taken in Indiana to keep this state on the right track.” –**Vice President Mike Pence**_

_“We are very pleased to see that the executive order he signed today does not include a criminal penalty for non-compliance, and we will continue to provide input in our role as part of the legislative branch of state government." –**Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray**_

_“Wearing face coverings inside public spaces or outside where social distancing is not possible protects yourself and those around you. With the importance of a safe return to school and to avoid moving ‘backwards’ in our efforts to get through this, I ask that we all comply with the Governors mandate” –**Warsaw Mayor and AIM President Joe Thallemer**_

_“Tough decisions are part of good leadership. I appreciate Gov. Holcomb taking the lead on mask mandates so that we can keep our businesses open, allow schools to open safely, and get Indiana Back on Track.” – **Wabash Mayor Scott Long**_

_“Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, Governor Eric Holcomb has led Indiana through this challenging time with a clear vision and a path to bring our state “Back on Track.” Despite our efforts, the Governor today found it in our best interests to mandate the wearing of masks. As the number of positive tests in our state, and more urgently to me, in our county, continue to rise, I support the Governor in taking this step and am urging residents of Huntingburg, Dubois County and Indiana to comply with the Governor’s order to “Hunker Down” and allow our schools to reopen and our businesses to continue to rebound from the effects of the pandemic.” –**Huntingburg Mayor Denny Spinner**_

_"We all recognize that difficult decisions are part of good leadership. As the Mayor of the City of Huntington, I support Gov. Holcomb’s difficult decision to implement a statewide mask-wearing mandate to fight the spread of COVID-19. While Huntington has been fortunate to avoid the higher COVID-19 infection rates other communities have experienced, I recognize that we could easily suffer the same fate.” – **Huntington Mayor Richard Strick**_

_“Governor Holcomb today announced a Mask Mandate for all Hoosiers beginning Monday, 7/27/2020, to address the escalating risks of COVID-19 across the State. I support the Governor’s action as it is the step that was under consideration here in Dubois County. Our county currently has the highest rate of COVID-19 per capita across the entire state. Memorial Hospital and Healthcare Center and Dubois County Health Department have expressed the need to support mandatory masks due to recent trends in metrics. Today, we also recorded two additional deaths attributed to COVID-19. By following the Governor’s Executive Order, we can minimize risks in the future. Citizens of Jasper and Dubois County must be part of the solution as we wish to avoid another “stay-at-home” order or the ultimate consequence, loss of loved ones.” –**Jasper Mayor Dean Vonderheide**_

_“The Martin Administration stands in support of Governor Eric Holcomb's recent mask mandate. As leaders, we sometimes have to do what is unpopular in the name of public safety and for the greater good. I still believe we can get through these uncertain times if we all do our part and strive to work together, rather than against each other. #INThisTogether” – **Logansport Mayor Chris Martin**_

_“Indiana is where I met my wife, my 3 kids were born, and I became a doggy daddy. I’ve always supported governors doing what they can and what they feel is appropriate to promote health in their state. Kudos to Indiana for promoting - it will help schools safely reopen! I also appreciate the statement on enforcement- ‘The state will approach enforcement of the face covering requirement with an emphasis on education.’ If local authorities help people understand why they should do something and how they benefit, they are more likely to comply.” –**U.S. Surgeon General Jerome Adams**_

_"Our economy will not be on the full road to recovery until some certainty is brought to this uncontrolled pandemic. The wearing of masks is a proven strategy for enhancing our health – both physical & economic.” – **Kevin Brinegar, Indiana Chamber of Commerce President & CEO**_

_“Governor Holcomb is doing the right thing and we applaud his continued leadership. Now, it is up to each one of us to do our part to keep Indiana on track by masking up. Our efforts will determine whether students can successfully return to school, small business owners can restart, and that our family and neighbors can stay healthy.” –**Rob McLin, Indiana Hospital Association Board President & President/CEO of Good Samaritan Hospital**_

_“Front-line workers in Indiana's hospitals have put their lives at risk each and every day to care for patients and contain the spread of the virus. They will continue these efforts throughout the pandemic and beyond. In return, the least we can do is wear a mask, wash our hands, and social distance.” –**Brian Tabor, Indiana Hospital Association President**_

_“The Indiana State Medical Association applauds Gov. Holcomb’s courageous leadership to require face masks for all Hoosiers throughout the state. This mandate is a necessary step to reverse the rising trend of COVID-19 and protect Indiana’s health care system from further strain. Face masks are a proven and effective tool to prevent transmission of the coronavirus and will allow Hoosiers to more safely visit their doctors for the preventive and ongoing care needed to stay healthy.” –**Dr. Lisa Hatcher, President of the Indiana State Medical Association**_

_"We appreciate Gov. Eric Holcomb's action and other efforts to keep people safe and to help reduce the impact of COVID-19 in Indiana. The science is clear that masks reduce the spread of COVID-19, and that’s why we require masks at our facilities around the world. We support all global efforts to increase safety as we continue to combat the virus.” –**Tom Linebarger, Chairman and CEO, Cummins**_

You can read the entire mask order **[here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=377d24c1ee5d439288d45888036cfcb5&_e=LJvjXWJWSMuFiK29_7QHml4QS_E3lpobWHkYFSLi32FZ413kFDcoNZvkB0mw7aBDB9bXoBJtBS41G5cwkNu6VjZt9q7EbVdUhUrFr5sJwZrB1vGonBLZ4l-uCRI_LFoSsUfgIdqdCbU7vVBqAI4cKCX44s9xNLDD-7ZUPHA75QOnm_ScG94HsJfQJAujU1ag5SwNanfW1LCDblxabA6MU_0y8CRNOSp84EfUfvgFWXk-Vfj4Mn4UHqcLHZNIcIHZZNST8whBzSmMz8nwOTkiILgEfUma2KGT_7e5OZ8CEiTkA7LCHhfbRQBXqJoiibh7tb9RQexWZOnbuypBsyH0oj7acX-QXIGmAAyGgbc95LI37ClZI6iUv0ISvDShVzeLaupPCON9YXncN-2iZA-iZaJ98eATISsNEdaTQRbFFYOefzO6Qa-3jhguFWB4MZdvt7CDDyVEEljLowwGheb50Lmb-BgACtKwCLPHrJ5E6cJuadsQ519vRDhbAmxcw12U52gNVe8mKktvJ88-mzirvQ%3D%3D)**. Together, we can all do our part to keep our fellow Hoosiers healthy and keep our state open!

-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

|

name: Margaret Good for Congress
subject: good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Before I ask you to contribute to my campaign, I want to take a few seconds to explain what’s at stake in this election and why reaching this month’s fundraising goal is so important. We simply can’t afford another term of Vern Buchanan. He’s failed our seniors, he’s failed people with pre-existing conditions, and he’s failed our nation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18415090/227832863/-940294256?refcode=072620-es-eom-2-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZmEyMy04MWNmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bXgyhJZ0kaezwEOXm0QRWvLGcSCs_H6PWj3auEa5_c=&emci=c9b25f4f-80cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=3adcfa23-81cf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)
Friend,

We’ll get right to the point, there’s good news and bad news that we need to share with you as we approach our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days.

**The good news** is that we have just been named a Red-to-Blue race by the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee — the only race in Florida to be named a top pickup opportunity to flip a seat from red to blue.

**The bad news** is that our opponent, multi-millionaire Vern Buchanan has $1.7 million in his campaign bank account after receiving hundreds of thousands from corporate PACs and there’s no telling how many personal checks he will write himself to fund attacks against us.

**That’s where you come in, friend.**

**[We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help power our campaign past Vern’s attacks funded by corporate PAC money. We simply can’t afford another term of Vern Buchanan. He’s failed our seniors, he’s failed people with pre-existing conditions, and he’s failed our nation. subject: 100 days

body:
Friend, it's crunch time. |
---
Friend -- **Election Day is 100 DAYS AWAY!**

With November 3 rapidly approaching, I wanted to share an update on the state of this race.

We've accomplished SO MUCH in such a short time:

**Since our LANDSLIDE PRIMARY VICTORY last month, this race has officially been upgraded to a TOSS-UP and multiple polls find me LEADING Sen. David Perdue.**

I'm so proud of the undeniable grassroots momentum this campaign is building. We are in a position of strength, we are on offense, and we're full steam ahead.

_But now we've got to dig deep._

**The GOP recognizes the strength of this movement for change in Georgia, and they're unloading a massive war chest to stop me from defeating Trump's favorite Senator.**

**[Right now, can you make a small donation so we can keep pace as we hit the homestretch of this campaign?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2123/5b2c1286/3df6056b/25f1729a/3544163203/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_26_100_days?refcode=em_2020_07_26_100_days")**

---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2123/5b2c1286/3df6056b/25f1729f/3544163203/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_26_100_days?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_07_26_100_days_ex_50")
---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2123/5b2c1286/3df6056b/25f1729e/3544163203/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_26_100_days?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_07_26_100_days_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2123/5b2c1286/3df6056b/25f172a1/3544163203/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_26_100_days?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_07_26_100_days_ex_other")
---
**The GOP is scared that I'm going to win in Georgia.**

**They see how tight this race is. And they know control of the Senate comes down to Georgia.**

That's why they've committed $25 million to stopping me. And with the backing of the Trump family and Mitch McConnell's super PACs, Perdue will continue to receive massive financial support.

**_We're in for a hell of a fight over the next 100 days._**

**Friend, I promise you this: I'm going to leave it all on the field. There's just so much at stake. I truly believe our Republic is on the line.**

**[I can't do this without you, though. Can you chip in to make sure my campaign has the resources it needs to emerge with a win in 100 days?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2123/5b2c1286/3df6056b/25f172a0/3544163203/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_26_100_days?refcode=em_2020_07_26_100_days&amount=10&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000")**

Much love,

Jon

Friend,

It’s official – we’re in the home stretch of this election season.

With just 100 days between today and Election Day, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for even a moment. Here’s why:

**We’re within striking distance of liberating Congress from under Nancy Pelosi’s thumb and returning it back to its rightful owner – the American people!**

Nancy’s super PACs and millionaire Hollywood donors aren’t going to make these next 100 days easy for us. They’re laser-focused on advancing the most radical, dangerous agenda ever seen before in American politics, and we can’t wait until November 3rd to fight back.

Friend, will you help me kick off our 100-day countdown to Election Day by chipping in $10 today and pledging to match that donation on July 31st?
[**JOIN OUR $10 MONEY BOMB TO FIGHT BACK**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=8362a4a9e76c427185e15277172974bc&_e=R2m6Ai6aAMkDAnrgabF9YafuP37026ktKKk_4U2IQYnV3i53t2yCN-DnSPlZpCSBmfSqe9quqNzV6Mrzb1FxNtHRy8LkbXIUOugJgA0zfttWf89rIvjE-ZK0bt8T2w7LHDLWF4eApnn9pSbCG8MFuVu1nXUApusi_g8M9kxi3cdyF1lZY3zCkufAEy57FQuCmHzyxWnjLsH0fZCm7Z3QyMNVn6NByq9QnBQWiSI8PZBt8yLu08itWwHjFbTMrNqUHj9Dauu4G4BlhEtst6WwPOE7lFsrTvtA7ZPf0zq_iUDBziSwJLCdzDr2Uid3-1U_Z-t3c5PQVSHLyTryxAy6c6ApYv-xaSaMSfkxIb_vlHpEiw5ary4xL7QJe011DHO7aQ5GDCdWddSh871GiVwHCvKTz5ikCC3GEBqMXnBj9woY_RMX-YNzr_FX2JG-4t2mSbC1zyr9T4FP91G5YEjoZzDdAguAFG-KE0tANDaEBVs%3D)
The Left’s vision for 2020 and beyond is defined by plans to treat the Chinese Communist Party as an ally instead of an adversary, raise taxes on families and small businesses through the roof, and endanger communities by defunding the police.

This is an agenda that will destroy America as we know it, plain and simple – and we’re going to need to fight back harder than ever these next 100 days to stop them at the ballot box and take back Congress once and for all.
[**HELP ME STOP THE LEFT’S RADICAL, DANGEROUS AGENDA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=8362a4a9e76c427185e15277172974bc&_e=R2m6Ai6aAMkDAnrgabF9YafuP37026ktKKk_4U2IQYnV3i53t2yCN-DnSPlZpCSBmfSqe9quqNzV6Mrzb1FxNtHRy8LkbXIUOugJgA0zfttWf89rIvjE-ZK0bt8T2w7LHDLWF4eApnn9pSbCG8MFuVu1nXUApusi_g8M9kxi3cdyF1lZY3zCkufAEy57FQuCmHzyxWnjLsH0fZCm7Z3QyMNVn6NByq9QnBQWiSI8PZBt8yLu08itWwHjFbTMrNqUHj9Dauu4G4BlhEtst6WwPPF5oy4VrDCttyTr92M5PeyDnUWclS-IWWO8jExg9tOA7q2IYG6SyUcgs7Ql4RtT6V0WcImO4OdO8LWdLfcqHLqNqDgwWZLWXR_ZfHdgLNm1qxU9wcZCZwq7SHxq9OHLKslyRwng-EPOTN6681WNU3lvPruGzgpgst0MvX7PKsc6pAp2b8_f3FbPfyuszqWetdHUZRiP_vonrWmtbkk7GnY%3D)

clean_body: The Left is advancing the most dangerous agenda ever seen in American politics, and we have 100 days to stop it We’re Just 100 Days Away From November 3rd! The Dems are pushing harder than ever – and we can’t afford to let up! | | | Friend, It’s official – we’re in the home stretch of this election season. With just 100 days between today and Election Day, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for even a moment. Here’s why: We’re within striking distance of liberating Congress from under Nancy Pelosi’s thumb and returning it back to its rightful owner – the American people! Nancy’s super PACs and millionaire Hollywood donors aren’t going to make these next 100 days easy for us. They’re laser-focused on advancing the most radical, dangerous agenda ever seen before in American politics, and we can’t wait until November 3rd to fight back. Friend, will you help me kick off our 100-day countdown to Election Day by chipping in $10 today and pledging to match that donation on July 31st? The Left’s vision for 2020 and beyond is defined by plans to treat the Chinese Communist Party as an ally instead of an adversary, raise taxes on families and small businesses through the roof, and endanger communities by defunding the police. This is an agenda that will destroy America as we know it, plain and simple – and we’re going to need to fight back harder than ever these next 100 days to stop them at the ballot box and take back Congress once and for all. Thank you, Darin LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469578?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-3-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Elizabeth_Warren&amount=&mc_cid=a45d203034&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

We have a battleground race happening right here in Indiana. The 5th District is up for grabs, and the Dems have their sights set on taking it.

In fact, Elizabeth Warren just thew her weight behind the Democrat nominee. You remember Elizabeth Warren – the failed Dem presidential nominee who wanted to raise our taxes, destroy the American health care system, and reverse the economic momentum our nation saw before the pandemic hit.

This is an election of national importance here in Indiana.

The Dems are pouring buckets of outside special interest money into this race because they are terrified of losing their House majority. And they know that they don’t have a chance of winning on their own merit.

We’re going to have to fight fire with fire on this one. We have a fantastic conservative candidate running, Victoria Spartz, who will fight for all Hoosiers in Congress.

Will you chip in what you can now to help Victoria Spartz win BIG in Indiana’s 5th this November? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-3-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Elizabeth_Warren&amount=&mc_cid=a45d203034&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We’re adding the name of every person who contributes before the end of the month to a special donor wall. Will you cement your name in Hoosier history by donating now?

Add your name NOW! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-3-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Elizabeth_Warren&amount=&mc_cid=a45d203034&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Even just a few dollars helps us with our grassroots efforts to get the vote out and get conservatives to the polls in 2020.

Winning this seat is going to get us a huge step closer to winning back the House majority, and evicting Nancy Pelosi from the Speaker’s Office once and for all.

Donate $3 for Indiana's 5th! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-3-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Elizabeth_Warren&amount=3&mc_cid=a45d203034&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We've hit every single monthly goal since the beginning of this campaign thanks to the help of over 56,000 donors who've stepped up to give us the boost we need. But we have to keep it up to beat Sen. Cornyn this November! **[Can I count on you to read the email below and become one of the new* donors from your community to help us reach our one-day goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ed3/7f51f7bc/40688362/4ef64e0f/1636516643/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200726.2nd__1796__&amount=10")**

>
> _The Cook Political Report_ and _Inside Elections_ have already upgraded this race in MJ's favor, and **new polling reveals Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable**. He has abysmal approval ratings and a ton of Texans report that they're undecided in the general election.
>
> But **we need the resources to reach all those undecided voters** before they cast their ballots, and that's why we're coming to you. Unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. She's counting on this grassroots team to power her campaign all the way!
>
> **Sen. Cornyn is calling in big money special interests to defend him, but we can fight back against them if just 13 new* donors from your community contribute today. Will you make a donation now to help us reach our goal?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: 100 Days Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nG0UqgErZ_CTCC_o9LuCbDU0kwlnxF4Q_2ZTtYxj188=/J4ep-VWeC5Rw-v_fzOHFFaPbbZ5P2doXgU2oji1A2ZY=)

Dear Friend,

It is hard to believe, but there are only 100 days until Election Day. I want to once again thank you for being a part of this campaign.

I'm sure that you've heard me say it before, but there are only two ways to run: unopposed or scared. We have an opponent, so we are working hard to earn the support of people in the district. And as the campaign ramps up, things will be a little different than previous years.

Instead of knocking on doors, we will be phone banking and leaving door hangers throughout the district. We will also use texting and email more to communicate virtually and get out the vote. Also, instead of fundraising events, we will have a few more online events and other unique ideas.

And yes, even virtual campaigning costs money. That's why I need your help.
[_**_Can you donate $10 today?_**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/nG0UqgErZ_CTCC_o9LuCbDU0kwlnxF4Q_2ZTtYxj188=/J4ep-VWeC5Rw-v_fzOHFFaPbbZ5P2doXgU2oji1A2ZY=)

Again, thank you for joining me on this journey! I cannot win this race without your support!

Sincerely,

Clarke

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nG0UqgErZ_CTCC_o9LuCbDU0kwlnxF4Q_2ZTtYxj188=/J4ep-VWeC5Rw-v_fzOHFFaPbbZ5P2doXgU2oji1A2ZY=)

subject: We have a problem
