body:
After winning the Democratic primary, my opponent received the $4 MILLION bribe-money that was waiting for her. And, just as we expected, that money went directly into funding vicious and false attacks which are currently flooding the Maine airwaves.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
_**We have a problem.**_
After winning the Democratic primary, my opponent received the $4 MILLION bribe-money that was waiting for her. And, just as we expected, that money went **directly** into funding vicious and false attacks which are currently flooding the Maine airwaves.
**Peter, I have never seen ads THIS bad and at this volume before ... I need your help to fight back! **
[STOP THE LIES >>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Right now, Mainers are being blasted with lies on their television, radio, phones and computers.**It is inescapable**. From the $4 million bribe-fund to Chuck Schumer's Super PAC, an unprecedented amount of Far Left dollars are inundating Maine with false ads. We can't afford to let them go unchecked.
**At the moment, my campaign is running low on resources. In order to set the record straight, our team needs to raise $100,000 by July 31st.**
My opponent might have Chuck Schumer and Far Left elites form across the country, but I have YOU. [**Could you please chip in anything to my campaign today so we can withstand these attacks?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[STOP THE LIES >>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CHIP IN $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CHIP IN $50](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=25&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CHIP IN $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=22&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

These ads are **LIES** and they are **EVERYWHERE**. It is our job to ensure the truth gets out. **[With your support](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDUyNzYS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjA1NjM1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0),** we can catch up to the Far Left and fight back against their dark money.
Thank you so much for your support. It truly means the world to me.
Susan Collins

name: Joe Biden
subject: What we do today will make the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There's no time to lose. |
---
Peter -- time flies. Today marks 100 days until November 3rd.

We're now in a sprint to the finish to reach voters in every state. We have a big list of key battleground states we need to win the Electoral College and it will take every moment of these next 100 days to reach voters in competitive states from Maine to Arizona.

Leading up to today, 100 days out, we had ambitious donation goals for each state, which is why we've been reaching out to folks in Pennsylvania. We're working harder than ever to meet our donation goal, because what we do today will put us where we need to be on Election Day.

With the backing of grassroots supporters like yourself, we can get our message out across the country. Every conversation we have, every phone call we make, and every ad we run makes a big difference.

[These 100 days are going to be crucial: there's no time to lose. Donald Trump will be hard to beat, and it's going to take everything we've got to win. Peter, will you chip in $5 to help us reach our goal in Pennsylvania and win in November?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Our team is growing by the day, with new supporters, volunteers, and staffers who have joined us in this final sprint to fight for the soul of this nation.

I'm honored to have you on this journey with me. It's important to show that Donald Trump doesn't represent the values that we share. If we stand together, we will bring integrity and decency back to the White House.

But I know that our impact will largely be determined by the resources we have to get our message heard. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help, Peter.

[Make a $5 contribution today:](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Donate**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B2_jrb100_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Yours truly,

_Joe Biden_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1ab/3749133883/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1aa/3749133883/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a9/3749133883/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a8/3749133883/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a7/3749133883/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a6/3749133883/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a5/3749133883/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a4/3749133883/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a3/3749133883/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a2/3749133883/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a5/3749133883/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a1/3749133883/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a4/3749133883/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b93a/1cd0ac28/175908249/357de1a0/3749133883/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Leading up to today, 100 days out, we had ambitious donation goals for each state, which is why we've been reaching out to folks in Pennsylvania. We're working harder than ever to meet our donation goal, because what we do today will put us where we need to be on Election Day. With the backing of grassroots supporters like yourself, we can get our message out across the country. Every conversation we have, every phone call we make, and every ad we run makes a big difference. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Our team is growing by the day, with new supporters, volunteers, and staffers who have joined us in this final sprint to fight for the soul of this nation. I'm honored to have you on this journey with me. It's important to show that Donald Trump doesn't represent the values that we share. If we stand together, we will bring integrity and decency back to the White House. But I know that our impact will largely be determined by the resources we have to get our message heard. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help, Peter. "" "" Yours truly, Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone, I can't believe July is almost over and today marks 100 days until the election! The countdown has begun and I couldn't be more
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/6cNEBe_-u/c?w=kVtdBPPRfBsptaJPTRqkc7SuWZm80VRuu5Gh7W9fqQM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby82Y05FQmVfLXUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | | | Lee's Newsletter - July 26th
---
| | Hi everyone, I can't believe July is almost over and today marks 100 days until the election! The countdown has begun and I couldn't be more excited. This past week our 15-county virtual tour continued with Lycoming and Sullivan Counties, and I was honored to be joined by our ever-inspiring candidates for the PA State Senate and House: Jackie Baker, candidate for State Senate District 23, Airneezer Page, candidate for State House District 83 and Amanda Waldman candidate for State House District 84. I'm so proud to be part of a rural coalition of candidates where the majority is made up of so many amazing female leaders. We had lively conversations with our constituents about issues ranging from the pandemic to climate change, seniors and veterans issues. These online town halls have become something I really look forward to because I get to spend time hearing from and talking to you, and learning about the issues that matter most to you. We also had a front row seat this week to an example of how a strong female leader can teach the older male politicians in Washington a thing or two. On the steps of the Capitol, Rep. Yoho called Rep. Ocasio-Cortez a "f***ing b*tch", in front of their peers and the press. This behavior is unbecoming of a member of Congress. When called on to apologize, he sounded even less like a respectable elected official who should set a good example and admit to his mistakes and rude behavior. In contrast, Rep. Ocasio-Cortez gave an impressive response to his non-apology with grace and dignity. That's the kind of leadership we need and should aspire to. Another wonderful display of the undeniable strength of women this week was the Wall of Moms in Portland, Oregon. In response to the administration's deployment of federal agents sent to crack down on BLM rallies, these incredible women stood as a human barrier to protect demonstrators from being beaten and unlawfully arrested. Their courage and conviction have inspired other groups to do the same, including former service members who attended rallies and formed their own Wall of Vets. When the President promised to build a wall, I doubt he had this in mind. However, this is exactly the kind of wall that reflects the true character of America - everyday people standing up for each other in the face of intimidation and violence, unafraid to make their voices heard. I was also happy to see the House vote to repeal the Muslim ban, also known as the travel ban. This vote is significant in what it communicates to the nation and the world, and what is says to me as the husband of a Muslim woman. With their bigoted, discriminatory policy, the administration tried to communicate that Muslims were not welcome in this country. The House vote to repeal that policy tells us the opposite - that America is a place where you will be welcomed regardless of your religion or background. This is the vision of America I am fighting for. I'm hopeful that Congress will be able to pass another stimulus bill quickly, as unemployment benefits from the Cares Act expire this week. If they don't pass the legislation before the summer recess, we'll have to wait until September for them to take action and people will suffer in the meantime. We'll learn the details of the latest proposal tomorrow, but my hope is that it includes significant funding for schools as they plan to reopen, continued funding of the Paycheck Protection Program and an extension of the federal supplement to unemployment. The federal government needs to make sure that people and businesses can stay afloat through the pandemic to ensure a fast and strong economic recovery. Our virtual tour continues this week with Potter and Perry Counties, and we've added several more events to the schedule. Please sign up for your county's Town Hall [here](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/6cNEBe_-u/c?w=kJPLZZXsAjx9YlPYg08ps-SVAFLeP47O0BxDRZFB6dg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aW55dXJsLmNvbS95OHB4eWs2NCIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) or take a look at our [Facebook](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/6cNEBe_-u/c?w=2EMm8rujFaWwqSCokrErYUENY0nq-ClzteMYN_JaWas.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0xlZUdyaWZmaW5Gb3JDb25ncmVzcy8iLCJyIjoiYjRjOGQwM2YtNjdhMi00Y2E1LTY1YTQtM2NlZGNmYTE4ODEwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZmY5MWEyMGQtZGIxOS00NGQ1LWIzZWUtOWIzZjhkYjBiYzJlIn0) page for the event in your county. Can't wait to see you at the next one! Hope you have a good week. Stay safe,Lee

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: 100 days. That's all the time we have to win this thing, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
That's less time to November 3rd than it's been since our campaign went all virtual, by the way. |
---
Peter -- it's Jen, Joe Biden's campaign manager.

I'm writing to you today because there are only 100 days between now and Election Day -- that's less time to November 3rd than it's been since our campaign went all virtual, by the way.

And if 100 days still feels like a long time from now, here are some more counts. Ballots will start to be cast in this election as early as mid-September, less than two months from now, in Minnesota, and followed closely by Michigan, Florida, and several others. You and I both know two months go by in a flash.

**So I want to share some important updates about the final stretch of this race in this email, and I 'm also going to ask you to make a commitment. But first, I'm going to make a commitment to you: We are going to play smart and play hard in key states. And we intend to win those states and this election. But we need your help.**

[**If you are financially able, will you commit to chipping in your first $5 right now to fund our plan to win over the next 100 days with grassroots donations?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Remember this map? It's a visual reminder of the work we have to do over the next 100 days of this race.
[](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
We have a path to the 270 electoral votes we need to defeat Donald Trump, but it runs through some states that are expensive to fully compete in.

It's going to be a long, tough battle, but I'm confident that if we can put all of our focus on getting up every single day and doing everything we can to win these states, we will win this race.

**But I have to be very clear about this next point, Peter: We will not be able to make any of this happen without your support.**

This election will be won (or lost) by the work we put in over the next 100 days, and we need all hands on deck to put in the work to help Joe win -- whether that's by chipping in a couple of dollars, making a few calls, or convincing all of your friends to get on board with Joe.

**So, I 'm asking you to dig deep today -- and every day over the next three months -- and join me in committing to doing everything you can to help us win this fight.**

[**If donating is one way you are able to commit today, can I count on you to make a contribution of $5 to fuel our campaign to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.26_B3_JOD-commitment_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

I'm looking forward to the work we're going to accomplish together. And to the day we're going to win this thing.

Onward,

Jen

Jen O'Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def79/3636026102/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def78/3636026102/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def77/3636026102/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def75/3636026102/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def73/3636026102/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def6e/3636026102/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def6c/3636026102/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def6a/3636026102/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def71/3636026102/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b910/1cd0ac28/175c01041/357def66/3636026102/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

body:
| |
---
| | | Friends,

It is hard to believe we are just 9 days away from the primary election! Our team has been working hard to share our conservative message and earn your vote.

Thank you to everyone across the Big First district who have welcomed our team, my family, and myself. We appreciate the words of support and encouragement we have received thus far, and hope that those of you who are still undecided will choose to support us at the ballot box.

This past week I had the honor of stopping in Council Grove, Hutchinson, Belleville, Concordia, Emporia, and many more cities! It was great to see so much enthusiasm amongst grassroots Republicans about the upcoming primary. I enjoyed meeting voters at each stop and am grateful to those who made me feel so welcome.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **Join us on the campaign trail! **

**TUESDAY, JULY 28: **
**Beloit:** Kettle, 204 S Mill, 8:00 - 9:00 AM
**Phillipsburg:** Kansasland Realty & Auction, 255 State Street, 11:00 - 12:00 PM
**Norton:** Heaton Building, 112 S State Street, 1:00 - 1:45 PM
**Plainville:** Astra Bank, 201 S Main Street, 3:00 - 4:00 PM
**Hays:** Astra Bank, 1100 Fort Street, 5:15 - 6:30 PM

**WEDNESDAY, JULY 29:**
**Colby:** City Limits Grill, 2227 S Range Avenue, 8:00 - 9:00 AM

**THURSDAY, JULY 30:**
**Great Bend:** Long Pumpkin Patch, HWY 281 & NE 30th Road, 3:30 - 4:45 PM

Keep up-to-date with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=2a648d7545&e=a9d1410029), [Twitter](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=16932af533&e=a9d1410029), or by visiting our [website](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=cb91089368&e=a9d1410029).
---
|
---
| Thank you for your continued support. I hope to see you soon!

All my best,
Tracey

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Sunday Recap: Schools, Testing, and Nursing Homes
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdoaP1nWJkm9BARDgfaAVC66drcGN4rj8BXlhmQbJ_TGn4lj37IHuYhGtyhBK6wCpQ6pALuCE6G3SgkZ57_hFX9n-x1m10RK4EKgCZKpPsMglvW0jZz4iuYMJS5Ojf3lZ_KBY0m0pqhcr9PXRr2OK5Et4FHLy5f05ZHAzsNwL7q4SYaNasMUPEycyaWkruLkWx0aUsdTPy3bIol5YWodpXiDpu0TueextUo0Lfx5dCikJTVL9z1VKLqYE8NGelKeHqDRk75u0H3CsaODPxUwkPMtA=&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==). The better we stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOLS
As we look toward reopening schools, Rhode Island is putting public health first and relying on facts and science to make the best decisions for the mental, physical, and intellectual needs of our students. We know that students benefit enormously from in-person learning, and our job is to make sure it can happen safely.
I know people are scared, and there's a lot of misinformation out there. As we've done all along, we're going to be open and transparent, share our thinking with you every day, and rely on the advice of experts. Our COVID-19 response can only work if we all work together, so I want you to hear the same advice I'm hearing at every step of the process. Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I will be holding weekly forums on my Facebook page every Thursday at 3 p.m. to talk with experts about our plan to reopen Rhode Island's schools. You can watch last week's forum [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdoaP1nWJkm9BAmyEdnhZiPEPh2ZFSUOQph899PCO8Agh6PScgBN6XwcIMbe7pTNyAI_ryjDaFCQMXurjtIJO-Hh8QFXFA8u8JMiF_cO0MjPhvji3uJVyWkLgwb0Leo3mVWxZIZkVdTWZUbrtqkFCE35AbOIqbSIyd36E7Ps1iwfLShMC_otGZEMHqkBn9kAvuD4HOdrQccj-wba-NjK7VaoR9h78G3ffUsxqABLqXVBDz3EChBIswa0QH3Qttx6AIo3a7cnH_fiPAKy_5vHVbBvYHtjv5xzQVHLhqrV1ZXwvmrWF8qwrSEba4o2O8LtdhzAc9wcz935kNAzLKfZEVzG3d1mZUeXhkWOdVa2d7NDx141aOED4gaC-uSNPXshYVpP8p5tEc44lyRxKAU00wump1AkOFvIGjGh_Ymv3xFuzP3F6-OeTt6sCzVpp6XOGihM15j06sQjBCcdx-OhzBHJzhQ9-QYABFU-7Xna25zWPMoano17a-CD0=&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==).
| | |
---|---
|
TESTING

We are continuing to expand capacity at our State Health Laboratory and are exploring partnership opportunities with private laboratories to ensure timely COVID-19 test results. Wait times of a week or more for testing is unacceptable, and we are actively working on a solution. Statewide, we have the capacity to run more than 5,000 tests per day, but on most days we're running around 3,000. We remain the national leader in testing, but in order to slow the spread of this virus as much as possible, we need more Rhode Islanders to get tested. If you have symptoms or are a close-contact worker, sign up to get tested at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdodLvDFfITYOH7vOuOzuDBEtQJ-6-riyFTJGTOx5ZyhsiiKO3vkyjm-NUkLDKrGqgFwEdXgy2nKQSeQRtYZfWpRc=&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==).
| | |
---|---
|
VIRTUAL CONNECTIONS IN
NURSING HOMES

Maintaining social connection in our nursing homes is so important right now. I'm excited to announce $100,000 in grants to nursing homes to help residents digitally connect with family and friends. Eligible facilities will receive up to $3,000 to purchase smart devices and related accessories for residents. Facilities can apply for this funding right now at [eohhs.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdoaP1nWJkm9BAMY9I5PnAU_nWZ5tBfybHydAcqXRwPdOmCFZanFCiTi0OB13Rct4oCzoHd_1xI922FvgSJ46jMq0=&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==).

I'm also excited to launch a virtual community center for older Rhode Islanders, through a partnership between our Office of Healthy Aging and Age Friendly Rhode Island. It's available on [agefriendlyri.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdoaP1nWJkm9BA57esQoJYh-X_jVJwnWUkSqmBXqxOm_ftF-qA8CnfNCDHHjBRos6ScygM-jqtgjS4srN1PrcZ_yZfwgjAjJ19xg==&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==) right now and includes educational and wellness programming, technology training, and live chat times to give older Rhode Islanders another way to connect with one another.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SnKuhaXC58d35Zun0VmoTnMhYGUHKArgiWGL0RLEH9WK-qLPQ3MdoaP1nWJkm9BA1WLbYtFUCSFSyJ8sJdL0Bi4w6BbdhxReuOsEk02lNh_fwg0rOsAmtZFIqM-hTnAFYHYI31QPwD2RTnoGBRkmGDiqQDUrLT1iILJeb62NCQTj3bylx5Rl4JkQAIJnhGAI-_CPZUJnzyOMr9nndD_oWOzrG7tkGoeoXERVA8iECTuwrqq6waEnlOhpV3zdgvN_NLTiFbXAE8prCgBJ3wc7L7YT5rVCaiV2-DyS9JCQ25RpzAqOVXIKoQwSn7Q_GLMURhZfCj4kmg0WSGc3idHPqpEgRFbWYqIa0S3XuT_oE3QnL0QMQtDJ6AQRGLHNCMNdVCQ6ZQ87fPKkafof9rYqcMymOlumr2K1vnFxfXxn0-cUfB20fuWipJGye7BjC6xy&c=UYcmRUrokiZ7FYtNkbRt0vWkyt5hlxruRoA4UkuUdx0GHREiBVoiCQ==&ch=IP1oq_Fcn0J1GDfZ5eQdlcXcFHnQMjbk9QWLn0lGwt61PZkve0aGVA==).

subject: Waking up in 101 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I don't want to wake up 101 days from now knowing I could have done more.

|

| | We've almost reached our 100 days goal, Peter, but Taylor tells me we're still 5 donors short in your area.

I'm counting on your help to put us over the top. With only 100 days left before November 3rd, we all need to be digging deep and doing _everything_ we can to flip the Senate. I don't want to wake up 101 days from now knowing we could have done more -- do you? \-- MJ

name: USPS Alert
subject: post offices in Georgia (MAJOR update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Things are not looking good.
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: U.S. Postal Service on track to go bankrupt by September - unless we take action NOW!**
|
---
The U.S. Postal Service is in crisis, friend.

**Officials warn that without emergency funding, post offices across the country - including in Georgia - will be forced to shutter. And _600,000_ hardworking employees could lose their jobs.**
The Postal Service is one of our nation's oldest, most vital institutions: Millions of Americans depend on it for access to lifesaving medication, Social Security benefits, groceries - and critically, mail-in ballots.
But in the midst of this public health crisis, the Trump administration _refuses_ to take action to save the Postal Service. Instead, they're working as hard as they can to sabotage mail delivery and DESTROY it for good.
That's why we need to speak up IMMEDIATELY and demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late. **We need another 27 concerned Democrats from Georgia to sign our urgent petition by midnight - but time is running out, and we still don't see your name.**
**[Please, friend: Add your name by midnight to DEMAND Congress save the U.S. Postal Service!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk407-ja-nd")**
